title: Golden Dataset Schema for SEBI Compliance Engine Evaluation

case_id.description: Unique identifier for the benchmark case

rule_id.description: The SEBI rule ID being tested

document_snippet.description: The chunk of text from the DRHP

expected_retrieval_hit.description: Whether this snippet should be retrieved for this rule

expected_reasoning_keywords.description: Keywords that must appear in the LLM reasoning
